Students must earn a minimum of 120 credits to

complete a degree.

Requirements for Graduation: fil At least 30 credits must be earned at UMD

Be eee

15 of the final 30 credits must be earned at the 300-400 level CO 12 upper level major credits must be earned at UMD

*Excluded from the 2.0 average calculation
